title: GUI Revision Dark
description: Revamps the vanilla GUI with a darker and cleaner look! (Mod support)
body:
#                                   GUI Revision Dark Mode

## Credits
This project is based on **[@Vixel's](https://modrinth.com/user/Vixel)** GUI Revision but is not directly affiliated with it. You can download the original texturepack [**Here**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision).

Some textures used in this pack also come form the texturepack Mandalas GUI get the original pack [Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode).

The font used in the pack is qrafty's Capitalized Font get the original fontpack [Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/qraftys-capitalized-font).

![This image shows: Crafting Tables, Cartography Table, Enchanting Table, Crafter, Loom, Smithing Table.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/978e92ccb1a092b3ad61fc1d36e8da6f54249eb6.png)

## What dose it add? 

The resource pack features unique GUI textures for most in-game containers. Additionally, it includes custom UI elements for select mods.

## Optifine?

For the best experience, it is recommend using Optifine or OptiGUI. However, the pack functions excellently even without these mods.

## Supported mods!
- Apple skin 
- Shulkerbox tooltips 
- Sophisticated backpacks 
- Clayworks
- Corpse
- Cosmeticarmorreworked
- Curios
- Farmersdelight
- Farmersrespite
- Miners delight
- Roughlyenoughitems
- Sawmill
- Sophisticatedcore
- Storagedrawers
- Toms storage
- Woodworks
- JEI
- Supplementaries
- Tinkers
- Extreme sound muffler
- Vault hunters mod
- Inventory profiles next
- Overflowing Bars
